benefits.description: Sleep greatly improved after adding Pinealon; Epitalon alone improved sleep but found Pinealon more effective
Energy boost noted; first dose taken at night caused too much energy to fall asleep quickly, so switched to morning

side_effects.description: Took Epitalon/peptide at night on first use; caused energy boost that delayed sleep onset

protocol_notes: References a Russian/Ukrainian protocol of 10mg per injection across 4 total injections spread over 17 days. Switched dosing to morning or mid-morning to avoid sleep disruption. Added Pinealon which significantly improved sleep over Epitalon alone.
